SocialHub.title: Cibiyar Jerin Zamantakewa
SocialHub.subtitle: Sarrafa haɗin yanar zamantakewa da aikace-aikacen ku.
SocialHub.connect_meta_desc: Haɗa shafukan ku da akunan ɗin kasua don aika kai-kai. Tabbatar da cewa akunan kasua Instagram ku an haɗa shi da shafukan Facebook.
SocialHub.connect_tiktok_desc: Haɗa akauntinmu ta TikTok don tsara da buga bidiyo kai tsaye.
SocialHub.beta_alert: Haɗin gidanja da Instagram da TikTok ana aiki da shi jiya kuma masu goyon bayan gida (Private Beta). Za a bugi aikin ba jiya ba waje.

LandingPage.hero_description: Kowane jatai yana buƙatar damara. Ba kayan aikin da aka tarwatse ba. RiveHub yana haɗa ayyukanku, kare farashin ku, da ƙarfafa jama'ar ku ta hanyar rikitaccen sabun aiki.
LandingPage.hero_bg_alt: Kicin fine dining na ƙwararru da jama'a a cikin sabuni
LandingPage.features_card1_title: Maballin Kiyaye Dokar da Matakai na Gyara
LandingPage.features_card1_desc: AI ta bincika kundin zafin jiki ku kuma ta ba da shawarwari don ba'a, don jama'ar ku su tabbata.
LandingPage.features_card2_desc: Karantacce ƙarfin littafi na ma'aikatan baje.
LandingPage.features_card3_desc: Haɓakar jiya ta mutu nan kaɗai zuwa harshen natiye na jama'ar kicin ku.
LandingPage.philosophy_bg_alt: Tsabataccen naman cikakken gidan cin abinci na fine dining
LandingPage.philosophy_intro: Aiki da gida jiya kamar ummarni a cikin hazo — ba tare da kayan aikin ba, kuka ta kimanta.
LandingPage.philosophy_vision: RiveHub shine damara da ke buɗe su'al zuwa gyara gida.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar1_desc: RiveHub baba ce ma abin da kuke sani — yana ƙara da bayanai kuma yana watsa zuwa kowane maigida a {count} harsunan. Babu wani katako a jiya.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar2_desc: Kowane batu da aka rasa shine carewa a ƙasa. Sonar na RiveHub yana bayyana shi kafin ka shige ruwa.
LandingPage.philosophy_pillar3_desc: Da aka fi santsi, da gidanku ya fi sanin ruwan. Jikinka ne — ba namu ba.
LandingPage.hero_loss_hook: Kwojen baje ba tare da data ba shine asalin bakin ciki.
LandingPage.calculator_title: Menene gwamma kamar ba zu ba ke tsaida ku?
LandingPage.calculator_subtitle: Karɓu farashin yawan aiki ba tare da bayanai masu amfani ba.
LandingPage.social_proof_banner: An sanye don gidajen cin abinci masu loƙaci a Quebec
LandingPage.protocol_desc: IQ na kicin ku yana tashi tare da kowane haɗi.
LandingPage.protocol_phase1_desc: Buɗin gida, RiveHub yana fara ilimanta jiya.
LandingPage.protocol_phase2_desc: Sayar ku a jiya sune zabe kowe abun.
LandingPage.protocol_phase3_desc: Dakika 30 na bukunan ku yau-yau kuma tsarin ku ya isa kafin 92% daidai.
LandingPage.footer_desc: Ilimin injiniya don gidajen abinci masu ban mamaki.
LandingPage.features_card1_ai_suggestion: Bincika jirgin ruwa da juyar da namannan nan da nan.
LandingPage.features_card2_alert: An gano gaggawa: Firiji na nama yana da 8°C.
LandingPage.features_card3_target_text: Limpiar la zona fría de las neveras
LandingPage.nano_banana_title: Saitin Na Jiya. (Mai Ƙarfi ta Ilimi).
LandingPage.nano_banana_subtitle: Gano kayan aiki namu hudu na sabon jiya don saura sudaji.
LandingPage.nb_haccp_desc: Gina ninka kafin lissafi tare da watsi. Kallon jiya na abinci, da hannun-hannun dijital kuma ba za a iya canza.
LandingPage.nb_sonar_desc: Dakin Shugaba. Lura da bincike, gano matsananci na jiya kuma inganta horon sanda a gida.
LandingPage.nb_ocr_desc: Ka kama takaita? Dauki hotuna. Claude AI nan da nan yana cire adadi, farashin da abubuwan. Sannu jiya mai gida.
LandingPage.nb_voice_desc: Furta waɗanki na kasua da umarni. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (saurin koli, mai harsuna biyu) yana juyar da bayyanar kuma yana raba don dukan sanda.
LandingPage.f1_desc: Manta da nisanin sanyi. Gujin sanda, gudu na kayan gida, da abubuwan bakin jiya ana zana kuma ana lura ta AI.
LandingPage.f1_ex1: Rubuta gudu na kayan gida (misali, "Firiji 2 yana zubar, a kira injiniya").
LandingPage.f1_ex2: Mikawa gajeren umarnin gaggawa ga sanda na jiya.
LandingPage.f1_ex3: Lura da abubuwan bakin jiya (bakin) don canza hanya.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Littafinka, ta atomatik. Daga zafin firiji zuwa mai fryer, RiveHub lura da kowane karantawa kuma ya yi alama ga cutarwa kafin su zama matsananci.
LandingPage.f2_ex1: Firiji ya bugi 8°C: shawarci don aiki mai hankali "Keɓe ko zubar da abinci mai haɗari".
LandingPage.f2_ex2: Tumaki na atomatik don lura da mai fryer.
LandingPage.f2_ex3: Shari'a HACCP wanda aka rubuta a lokacin bincike.
LandingPage.f3_title: Juyarwa nan da nan a {count} Harsuna
LandingPage.f3_desc: Babu kamuwa da harsuna a gida. Kowane miyar sanda yana samun dakin gida da shigarwar littafin a yaransa na asili.
LandingPage.f3_ex1: Shugaba ya rubuta a Sunyanci, mai gidan iska yana karanta a Bengali.
LandingPage.f3_ex2: Katunan resiti ana fahimta jiya nan da nan ta dukan sabuwar ma'aikaci.
LandingPage.f3_ex3: Shari'ar tsaro an ƙara ba tare da la'akari da asalin ma'aikaci ba.
LandingPage.integrations_banner: Haɗi tare da tsarin POS natively: Toast, Square, SumUp, Stripe, Lightspeed, Zettle...
LandingPage.f4_desc: Radiyar Riba ɗinku ta haɗa zuwa POS ɗinku don kwatanta guguwar siyar da farashin kargo a jiya.
LandingPage.f4_ex1: Shigo tare da siyar natively daga Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, ko Lightspeed.
LandingPage.f4_ex2: Gano "Stars" akan "Rocks" jajjaga tare da jadadan Matrix na aiki.
LandingPage.f4_ex3: Tsarin ba kama? RiveHub's AI shigo tare da parse kuma shigo CSV export kome.
LandingPage.f5_desc: Tsaya shirya bayanan ta hannu. AI fitar da bayanai, lissafi, da farashin daga takardar bayarwa don tabbatar da zane ɗinku.
LandingPage.f5_ex1: Daukar hoto na takadar mai ciki wacce ta bugi ɗin aji bayarwa.
LandingPage.f5_ex2: Tsigon line-by-line extraction da jajjage fashi don abubuwan ciwon ciki.
LandingPage.f5_ex3: Live da isasshen sabunta na kudin abinci na resipe ɗinku.
LandingPage.f6_desc: Jidue sabuwar abokan ciniki tare da bayanai masu ban sha'awa na saban kulinarari wajen jiya.
LandingPage.f6_ex1: Haifar da takara mai kamci don jirgin tahuwa na Valentine tare da emojis daidai.
LandingPage.f6_ex2: Fassara bayanai ɗinku don jidue abokan ciniki na kasua.
LandingPage.f6_ex3: Shirya bayanai mai ba sha'awa don niyyoyin bayarwa (UberEats, Deliveroo).
LandingPage.f7_desc: Daidaita duk sabuwar pasenja daga Libro, Resy, da Zenchef. Webhooks da isasshen polling don lissafi na halinsa.
LandingPage.f7_ex1: Karbi ajiyar kumaci ta gida nan da nan ba tare da shiryar hannu ba.
LandingPage.f7_ex2: Tara bakin gida, barin, da ba-kasua a gida gida daya.
LandingPage.f7_ex3: Kwatanta bayanin abokan ciniki don samun tunani game da adadin aiki ɗinku.
LandingPage.f8_desc: Binciken Sonar yayi kwatantawa da pasenja ɗinku na zuwa, guguwar siyar, da zane don samar da hanya ta shirya.
LandingPage.f8_ex1: Lissafa lissafi dicon kowane jajjaga bisa ainihin bakin gida da aka tabbatar.
LandingPage.f8_ex2: Tara abubuwan abinci da ake buƙata don tsira jirgin da ke zuwa.
LandingPage.f8_ex3: Kimanta jiyya kargo kafin ma tashi jirgin.
LandingPage.f1_mock_entry1: Abin sanin sanyi 2 yana tuƙi, tsohuwar gida ta kira
LandingPage.f1_mock_ai_task: ✨ AI: Aiki "Kira mai sanin ruwa" ya waɗa
LandingPage.f6_mock_caption: Gano jiyar gida ta gida! Bluefin tuna da aka yi dabara sosai... ✨ Reservation a cikin bayanin jiya 👇
LandingPage.tier_essential_desc: Jirgin da ke da karfi da yanayin ecosystem don tsara ayyukatanka a kowace rana.
LandingPage.tier_performance_desc: Radar na Riba na ke taimakawa ka yi tsari mafi kyawun hanyoyi da bukatun kudin.
LandingPage.tier_intelligence_desc: Zurfin Kasusuwar Riba tare da tsinkaya don jagora jerin jirgi ta atomatikanci.
LandingPage.f9_desc: Daidaitaccen furuci don ruwa. Sarrafa abubuwan keg yields, lura da ajiyar gilasi daban-daban, da aiki cikakken micro-brewery kanban.
LandingPage.f9_ex1: Ka'iba taka ajiyar bokoli da keg daga ainihin Farashin Gida.
LandingPage.f9_ex2: Lura da ainihin asusun zubar (bambantanci) tsakanin POS saje da ƙimanin janyayan.
LandingPage.f9_ex3: Sarrafa naman giya dinka daga fermentation zuwa kegging tare da takaice na yield.
LandingPage.res_mock_last_sync: SANEREWA NA KARSHE: minti 2 da suka wuce
LandingPage.f10_desc: Karanta matsi na sama a kan abubuwan samun salo. Electricity da cin ruwa a kowane wata haka ka iya daidaita kafin akwai jiya.
LandingPage.f10_ex1: Lura da alamar amfani electricity a kowane wata.
LandingPage.f10_ex2: Dube yadda cin ruwa ke bambanta.
LandingPage.f11_desc: Kallon gida na waje na fulani na kudin da algorithm mai karfi don samun riba. RiveHub ta kwatanta dolar kowane ɗaya da ke shigowa tare da gram kowane ɗaya da ke fita.
LandingPage.f11_ex1: Kusan farashin riba na kasua a halin yanzu.
LandingPage.f11_ex2: Yadda shigowa da fitowa ke aiki tare.
LandingPage.f11_ex3: Ƙarƙashin ɓataya bukatun kudin don gano darasinsu.
LandingPage.f3_target_example: Limpia el suelo a fondo esta noche.
LandingPage.journey_subtitle: Bayayanka ka girma. Tsarin ka koya. Shawarwarka ka karuwa.
LandingPage.journey_phase0_desc: Sonarinka ta samu bakin jiya. Ƙaranƙaryar jiya na rubutu.
LandingPage.journey_phase1_desc: Yanzu ka ga yanayin siyya na jiya. Daidaito na tarihi ya bayyana.
LandingPage.journey_phase2_desc: Cikakken a gida na aiki. Ƙaramin abinci ya yi zuwa kowane shawarwa.
LandingPage.journey_phase3_desc: Tsarin AI naka ya koya ƙuri'anka ta musamman. Daidaito 92% na ƙiyayya.
LandingPage.brigade_desc: Juyin mulki yana faruwa lokacin da sadarwa ta kauce. RiveHub yana juya ƙungiyar kicin da ke da yawa, kutse-kutse, zuwa crew da ta dace.
LandingPage.brigade_f1_desc: Tare da goyan 25+ na harsuna na asali, recipes suna ba da umarni a cikin Spanish yayin da ake karatu a Bengali. Gagarumin to a ko'ina.
LandingPage.brigade_f2_desc: Bayanan shirya na hoto da hanyoyin horon da ta dace suna rage lokacin shiga da 60%. Bada sabuwar ma'aikanta matakin ba tun farkon aiki.
LandingPage.brigade_f3_desc: Binciken gida da sanya hannu na jiya ba binkasa ba ne lokacin da aka yi ta wasa. Ci gida girman mutane tare da bayanan logbook mai kwanciyar hankali.
LandingPage.gamification_desc: Menene ƙaranƙaryar ku? Dauki bayanan 2-minute don gano matsakaicin shirya na aiki naka da bude ƙarfi na nuni.

Pricing.title: Farashin da aka sarƙa, tasiri na ainihi.
Pricing.subtitle: Fara kyauta, dagawa yadda kake shirmi.
Pricing.badge_free: Fara kyauta — babu bukatun katin credit
Pricing.tier_essential_desc: Mahimmin sashi da tsarin aiki don tsara ayyukanka na yau da gida.
Pricing.tier_performance_desc: Radar na Riba na kai watau da mafi ba da jajere samun arihi.
Pricing.tier_enterprise_desc: Jirgin tilo da yawa tare da tallafin fasaha na musamman.
Pricing.tier_intelligence_desc: Zurfin Kasua na Riba tare da tsinkaye don jagorantar jirgina ta kasua.
Pricing.waste_calculator_title: Nawa ne gashin jiya ke tsada maka a yanzu?
Pricing.waste_calculator_subtitle: Kasance isa kan samuwa ba tare da cikakken bayanai ba.
Pricing.enterprise_custom_desc: Taswira ta haɗawa, jirgin tilo da yawa, ajiyewa ta kwallo, da horon.
Pricing.footer_desc: Hanyar tunani na taswira don gidajen abinci na taswira.
Pricing.nano_banana_subtitle: Gano kayan aiki guda hudu na sabon na sarrafa gida baɗin daɗi.
Pricing.nb_haccp_desc: Gina ninka buɗi niyoyin tantance tare da sauri. Sarrafa cin abinci na kwakwa, da siginewa na siyya da baɗin canja.
Pricing.nb_sonar_desc: Daskar na Jerin Dadi. Lura da bincike, gano matsanancin dakin dadi da inganta horo ta ƙungiyarku a gida.
Pricing.nb_ocr_desc: Kana da invoice? Dauki hotona. Claude AI nan da nan yana fitar da adadi, farashin da kayan abinci. Sai jiya shiryayyen bayani da hannu.
Pricing.nb_voice_desc: Kawo da bayaninku na shirye-shirye da umurnin. Whisper V3 Turbo AI (sannu, mai harsuna biyu) yana rubuta da rarraba don gaijin duka.
Pricing.features_title: Duk kayan aiki da kuke buƙata don balagudu, a waje gida.
Pricing.f1_desc: Tabbata dari-dari. Aiki handova, matsalolin kayan aiki, da abubuwan da suka faru ne an rubuta, an zana, an lura dasu ta AI.
Pricing.f1_ex1: Rubuta hadari na kayan aiki (misali, "Fridge 2 yana zubewa, an kira mashinikau").
Pricing.f1_ex2: Pass cikakken umurnin balagudu ga ƙungiyar jiya.
Pricing.f1_ex3: Lura da abubuwan da suka faru ga balaguje (baƙi) don sabunta hanya.
Pricing.f2_title: Karɓuwa Ba tare da ciwon kai ba (HACCP)
Pricing.f2_desc: Littafin logs ɗinka, a sauri. Daga zafin fridge zuwa man aliyar fryer, RiveHub yana lura dasu duka da ƙara al'amari kafin su zama katane karɓuwa.
Pricing.f2_ex1: Fridge ya bugi 8°C: shawarar gyara "Ware ko cire abincin ƙidi mafi girma".
Pricing.f2_ex2: Kula ta gida don binciken man aliyar fryer.
Pricing.f2_ex3: Bayanan tsarin HACCP idan ana yin bincike.
Pricing.f3_title: Jifa Nan da nan a {count} Harsuna
Pricing.f3_desc: Maimakon jifawa ba ya wanzu. Kowane memba ya bugi app da bayani a yaransa.
Pricing.f3_ex1: Jerin dadi ya rubuta a Spanish, mai shafe tukwici ya karanta a Bengali.
Pricing.f3_ex2: Katunan resiti an fahimta nan da nan daga duk sabon ma'aikata.
Pricing.f3_ex3: Matakin aminci aka samu duk da asalin ma'aikaci.
Pricing.f4_desc: Abin duniyan Riba ɗinka ya haɗi da POS ɗinka don kwatanta adadi na siyarwa tare da farashi a jinsi. Haɓaka lokacinki kudi na kanka.
Pricing.f4_ex1: Ka shiga siyarwarka daga Toast, Square, SumUp, Zettle, ko Lightspeed ta sauri.
Pricing.f4_ex2: Gano "Taurari" da "Dutse" jinja tare da Smart Matrices Abubuwa.
Pricing.f4_ex3: Tsarin ba ya dace? RiveHub AI yana karanta kuma shiryar duk CSV fitar.
Pricing.f5_desc: Dakatar da shiryayyen invoice na hannu. AI yana fitar da gindin, kayan aiki, da adadi kaɗai don sabunta nettinku farashin.
Pricing.f5_ex1: Ɗauki hotona invoice mai ɗamjewar mai isar da kaya a shigowa.
Pricing.f5_ex2: Fitar kaɗai kowane layi da al'amari na sababi farashi don kayan abinci.
Pricing.f5_ex3: Live da ta sauri sabunta na farashi abin cin abinku.
Pricing.f6_desc: Jawo sabon balaguje tare da abubuwan kyauta na abincin ɗinka da aka ƙirƙira a taki gida.
Pricing.f6_ex1: Ƙirƙiri rubuce mai ban sha'awa don menu Valentine da ingantattun emojis.
Pricing.f6_ex2: Jifanta ta sauri bayananku don jawo balaguje na duniya.
Pricing.f6_ex3: Rubuta bayanin mai sha'awa don platforms ɗinka na gida (UberEats, Deliveroo).
Pricing.f7_desc: Daidaita duk ajiye ƙasuwar balaguje ɗika daga Libro, Resy, da Zenchef. Webhooks da polling ta sauri don sabunta na jinsi.
Pricing.f7_ex1: Samu ajiye na online nan da nan ba tare da shiryayyen hannu ba.
Pricing.f7_ex2: Taru balaguje masu isa, soke, da ba-zuwa a gida gida.
Pricing.f7_ex3: Kwatanta bayanan balaguje don taba adadin aiki.
Pricing.f8_desc: Sonar Analysis yana kwatanta balagujinka masu isa, raguwar siyarwa, da zane don ta sauri haɓaka jerin shirye-shirye.
Pricing.f8_ex1: Lissafi na rations daga kowane jinja dangane da hakika balaguje da aka tabbata.
Pricing.f8_ex2: Tara kayan abinci na asali da ake buƙata don wagi na gida na gida.
Pricing.f8_ex3: Taba jimlar kuɗin cargo kafin ma tashi na jirgin.
Pricing.f9_desc: Ainihin lura da ruwan ruwa. Sarrafa keg yields, lura da sune na gilashi daban-daban, da aiki kanban na cikakken micro-brewery.
Pricing.f9_ex1: Ka keɓe kaɗai akwatin da dirke daga ainihin Jiyya Abinci.
Pricing.f9_ex2: Lura ainihin asusun iska (bambaci) tsakanin sako POS da ƙididdiga jikko.
Pricing.f9_ex3: Gudanar da ɗamuwandaki na giya daga fermentation zuwa kegging tare da musamman abubuwan da aka samu.
Pricing.journey_subtitle: Bayyanarkak yana girma. Tsarin ka yana koyo. Kararkak yana faɗi.
Pricing.journey_phase0_desc: Sonarun ka yana sanar da bakin jiya. Duba mafi sauƙi na turke.
Pricing.journey_phase1_desc: Yanzu kana ganin misalai na sayar da jiya. Daidaitawar tarihi yana bayyana.
Pricing.journey_phase2_desc: Cikakken duba-dubaka na aiki. Kudin abun'ade yana zuwa cikin kowane yanke shawara.
Pricing.journey_phase3_desc: Tsarinsa na AI ya koyo bambamun naka na musamman. Daidaita fahimta 92%.
Pricing.brigade_desc: Tawaye yana faruwa lokacin da sadarwa ta karya. RiveHub yana juya ƙungiyar kula da abinci mai yawa-yawa, da gurguzu, zuwa ƙungiyar da ke aiki cikin juna.
Pricing.brigade_f1_desc: Da goyan bayan 25+ harsuna na jiya, resifi yana umarna a Hausa yayin da aka karantawa a Bengali. Bridge yana a ko'ina.
Pricing.brigade_f2_desc: Bayyanin shirye-shirye na maraye da hanyoyin lissafi na atai suna yanke lokaci na haɗin gida 60%. Jiya sabon ma'aikaci kafin aikin farko.
Pricing.brigade_f3_desc: Jadwalin tashin hankali da damje-damjen agogon ba su ne kudewar kai lokacin da aka yi wasa. Jiya damje-damje mai sauƙi tare da bayyanin logbook.
Pricing.gamification_desc: Shin, inane ne duba-dubakak? Karanta abin mintina 2 don gano yankin tsarin ka da buɗe ingantattun mabambanci.

CGU.title: Sharatin Aiki — RiveHub
CGU.s1_p1: RiveHub shine tsarin software-as-a-service (SaaS) da aka tsara don **taimakawa** manajan gidajen cin abinci, manajoji, da masu aiki a aiki na abinci a cikin ayyukan yau da kullun ta hanyar kayan AI da bayanan da aka fahimta. Ana iya samun aiki a **rivehub.com**.
CGU.s1_p2: Tsarin yana ba da abubuwa da yawa, ciki har da abubuwa masu zuwa:
CGU.s1_l1: **Littafin aiki na dijitali** — AI-powered rubuta aiki, rarrabe ta atomatik, gano wahala, da shawarwarin gyara
CGU.s1_l2: **Kula da zafi** — Rubuta, bincike jinjina, da shawarwarin gyara da suka bi HACCP
CGU.s1_l3: **Sarrafa menu** — Ƙirƙira menu, gyara, da kashe ta QR code da gida kaɗan na jama'a
CGU.s1_l4: **Bincike farashi abinci** — Lissafin riba ta atomatik kwa kowane abinci, sarrafa sinadarai da mai kasuwa, kallo da farashi, da ɗigo da riba
CGU.s1_l5: **Inkila menu** — Rarrabe menu ta BCG-matrix (Star, Anchor, Drift, Rock) da shawarwarin dabarun AI
CGU.s1_l6: **Dijitalishewar resiti da invoice (OCR)** — AI vision model-powered gano aiki don cire bayanan daga invoices da resiti
CGU.s1_l7: **Smart prep lists** — Ƙirƙira ta atomatik dangane da ajiyoyin gida, bayanan bai da jiya, da resipai
CGU.s1_l8: **Sarrafa ajiya** — Daidai-daidai a cikin tsari masu yawa da hasashe yawan mawaita
CGU.s1_l9: **Gurin tsarin jama'a** — Ƙirƙira abubuwa ta AI don Instagram, Facebook, da TikTok
CGU.s1_l10: **Kila bayani da asarar jiya** — Bambanta na ka'ida da na gaske, rubuta sharar abinci, da matukan aiki
CGU.s1_l11: **Ajiye da kila bayani** — Rubuta kuɗin yau da daidai asusun banki
CGU.s1_l12: **Dashboard na lissafi (Le Nid)** — Bayanan jiya, ƙirƙira riba, da nuni na jiya
CGU.s1_l13: **Kila bayani na karfi** — Kula da wutar lantarki da ruwan jiya
CGU.s1_p3: RiveHub shine **kayan taimakawa ga yanke shawara**. Ba ya maye gurbin sani na mutane, ba ya maye gurbin karfi na ɗan iska, ko ba ya maye gurbin wajibar masu amfani ta jiya ba.
CGU.s2_p1: A cikin wannan sharafi, abubuwan da ke zuwa suna da ma'anoni da aka saita:
CGU.s2_d1_def: Tsarin RiveHub da aka buɗe a rivehub.com, ciki har da duk abubuwan da ya ke yi, APIs, da aikacin da ya dace.
CGU.s2_d2_def: Kowa ko wani a kan jama'a wanda ya kirkira akaundi akan tsarin da ya karbi waɗannan sharai.
CGU.s2_d3_def: Gidan cin abinci da aka jimawa ta mai amfani a cikin aiki, tsarin aiki na farko.
CGU.s2_d4_def: Language model (LLM) da vision model na kayan da aka bayar daga ajiyoyi na ketare (musamman Anthropic / Claude), haɗa a cikin aiki don bincike, ƙirƙira abubuwan, da cire bayanan.
CGU.s2_d5_def: Kowane haɗi tsakanin aiki da tsarin waje (POS system, ajiya platform, hanyar jama'a) ta hanyar APIs ko webhooks.
CGU.s2_d6_def: Gane haruffa ta karɗa — kayan aiki don cire rubutu da bayanan daga hotuna na gida.
CGU.s2_d7_def: Duk bayani da mai amfani ya saka, ya shigo, ko ya tsara a cikin aiki, ciki har da bayani, menu, resipai, hotuna, jiya, da tabbataccen tsari.
CGU.s2_d8_def: Alamar lambar da ke nuna matakin daidaituwa da cikakken bayani na gida a cikin tsarin.
CGU.s3_s1_p1: Bukatar aiki yana buƙatar kirkire akaundi tare da adireshin imel da ya cancanci. Mai amfani ya yarda ya ba da bayani masu yawa kuma ya jiye shi a jiya.
CGU.s3_s2_p1: Mai aiki ne kawai ne ya kamata ya kula da asusun shiga sirri. Kowane aiki da aka yi a ƙarƙar asusu na Mai aiki ana ɗauka cewa Mai aiki ne ya yi shi. Idan an yi shakka cewa an bugi asusun, Mai aiki dole ya sanar da RiveHub ba tare da jinkira ba.
CGU.s3_s3_p1: Mai mallakin asusun na iya gayyaci membobin tawaye ya shiga aikin jiya restoron. Muhimman ayyuka da ake da su ne:
CGU.s3_s3_l1: **Mallakin restoron** — Cikakken shigar, sarrafa jeza, gayyaci da cirewa membobi
CGU.s3_s3_l2: **Mananaja** — Shigar abubuwan aiki da saitin restoron
CGU.s3_s3_l3: **Membar tawaye** — Karantawa da shigar bayani dangane da kuwan abubuwan da aka kunna
CGU.s3_s3_p2: Mai mallakin asusun ya kamata ya yarda da ayyukan da membobin tawaye suka yi a cikin Aiki.
CGU.s3_s4_p1: Gwajin kwanaki 14 akwai ba tare da karatun kuɗi ba. Bayan wannan lokaci, dole ne ka sa hannu kan nau'in jeza da tsada don kuma amfani da shahararren abubuwan. Bayani da aka shigar a lokacin gwaji ana adana su.
CGU.s4_p1: RiveHub yana ba da dama a haɗa zuwa abubuwan aiki na waje don ƙara ƙarfin abubuwan. Mai aiki ya gane cewa waɗannan haɗi gwiwa suna dogara da abubuwan aiki da mahimmin jama'a suke gudanarwa.
CGU.s4_s1_p1: Aiki yana goyan bayan juyawa a tare da wannan tsarin biya:
CGU.s4_s1_p2: Bayani na kasua da aka shiga ta hanyar waɗannan haɗi gwiwa ana amfani da su don nazari na faɗi na abinci, injiniyar menu, da hasashen ƙarewa.
CGU.s4_s2_p1: Aiki yana juyawa bayani na ajiyar kujerun baje'u daga:
CGU.s4_s2_p2: Bayani na kujerun baje'u ana amfani da su don hasashen adadin baƙi da samar da jerin ƙarewa.
CGU.s4_s3_p1: Aiki yana ba da dama a haɗa ga wurare masu zuwa don sigar abubuwan:
CGU.s4_s3_p2: Mai aiki ya ba da izini ga RiveHub da ta sigar abubuwan a maimakonsa kawai bayan bayyananniyar amincewa da kowane sigar.
CGU.s4_s4_p1: RiveHub ba za ta janyewa alhakin katsewar, sauya API, rashin daidaituwar bayani, ko rashin aikin abubuwan da ake kan tsara abubuwan na wajen uku ba. Mai aiki ne ya kamata ya kula da kula da bayani na haɗi gwiwa da kirkirar daidaituwar bayani da aka juyawa.
CGU.s5_s1_title: 5.1. Kadar abubuwan da jijiya ta bugi
CGU.s5_s1_p1: Aiki ya haɗa jijiya artifisyal keɓi (LLM da kowane alawar laifi) da wajen uku suka ba (Anthropic / Claude). Waɗannan keɓi ana amfani da su don:
CGU.s5_s1_l1: Nazari da rujewa bayani na ajiya kayan aiki
CGU.s5_s1_l2: Tayin abubuwan gyarawa lokacin da aka gano kusan kuskure (jibgi, aiki)
CGU.s5_s1_l3: Fassara abubuwan a hanyoyin da aka goyan ({count} hanyoyi)
CGU.s5_s1_l4: Cire bayani daga hoto na aljihu da fakiti (OCR)
CGU.s5_s1_l5: Samar da abubuwan rubutu da sauki wa media na jama'a
CGU.s5_s1_l7: Samar da jerin ƙarewa dangane da kasancewa da hasashen jiya
CGU.s5_s1_l8: Nazari na faɗi na abinci da marubucin kumuyi
CGU.s5_s1_l9: Kira alamu na kuɗi a jiyar ƙisas
CGU.s5_s2_p1: **Tayin, nazari, da abubuwan da jijiya artifisyal da ta dauke RiveHub ta ba don bayani da nisbata kawai.** Mai aiki ya gane da yarda cewa:
CGU.s5_s2_l1: Tayin jijiya **ba su zama shawara na ƙwararru** a batun kariya abinci, bin dokoki, ƙisas, jari na jari, ko wani bangare.
CGU.s5_s2_l2: Tayin jijiya **ba su maye gurbin** karamin hankali na ƙwararru (jami'i na jari, ƙwararru na ƙisas, ƙwararru na jiya-jiya).
CGU.s5_s2_l3: AI na iya samar da **sakamakon da ba daidai ba, marasa cikakke, ko da ba daidai ba** saboda yanayin probabilistic na yawancin harsuna.
CGU.s5_s2_l4: **Mulkin gaba daya ga duk shawarwarin aiki** — gida da ayyukan gyara, shawarwarin kuɗi, buga abun ciki, da matakan mutuwanci — **ya kasance ne kawai a gefen User**.
CGU.s5_s2_l5: RiveHub **ba ya garantar mutuwanci na ka'ida** na gida. Aiki yana rubuta don *tallafawa* sarrafa aiki, ba garantiya ba.
CGU.s5_s3_l1: **Tabbatar da kaunatawa** duk shawarwarin da AI ya samar da su kafin amfani dasu a aiki
CGU.s5_s3_l2: **Kar a dogara kawai** akan shawarwarin AI don shawarwari da suka shafi kasua, jijiya hadari, ko wuri makabe na gida
CGU.s5_s3_l3: **Iyo mahimmanci da horon** da ake bukatar ma'aikata, duk da amfani da aiki
CGU.s5_s3_l4: **Sanar** kowane shawarware da ba daidai ba ko maye da alhali zuwa ɗan gida RiveHub ta hanyar bayanan goyon bayan
CGU.s5_s4_p1: Juyawa da AI ta samar da ita ana ba da ita don baje ne kawai. RiveHub ba ya garantar daidaita, cikakken, ko daidain juyawa, musamman don sadarwa da jijiya. Ana karɓar masu amfani su kawar da kula sadarwa ta hanyar mahimmancin mai amfani.
CGU.s5_s5_p1: Bayani da aka fita atomatik daga hotuna (alkalami, invoices) na iya daɗa kuskure. User ne mai karɓa daidaita abubuwan da aka fita kafin samewa a ajiye ko aiki.
CGU.s5_s6_p1: Intelligence Score shi ne alamar ciki da ke nuni da cikakken bayani da aka shigar a Aiki. Ba shi fitar da ainihin umarni na gida kuma ba ya kamata a bayyana shi azaman bincike ko kimantawa mai sana'a.
CGU.s5_s7_p1: Aiki yana gudu ayyuka ta atomatik jiya-jiya, gida da:
CGU.s5_s7_l1: Daidaitawa na bugi daga dandali da aka haɗa
CGU.s5_s7_l2: Samar da jerin shirya ta yau
CGU.s5_s7_l4: Aika sadarwar kula da bayani na aiki
CGU.s5_s7_p2: Wadannan samar da aiki suke aiki a bari kuma na iya shafin samun aiki na ɗan gida waje. User ba ya kamata a dogara kawai akan sakamakon samar da aiki ba tare da tabbatarwa ba.
CGU.s5_s8_p1: Tsare-tsare na buga da AI ta samar (sunan aiki, alamomi, tsera) sune shawarware da ke bukatar duban User kafin buga. RiveHub ta kashe duk karfin jiya ga abun da User ya buga a sadarwacewa, har da idan aiki ya shawar da shi.
CGU.s6_s1_p1: RiveHub ta tattara da sarrafa bayani na mutum daidai da Canada's Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Act 25), da, inda ya fi dacewa, European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
CGU.s6_s2_p1: Aiki ta tattara da sarrafa wadannan nau'ikan bayani:
CGU.s6_s2_l1: **Bayani na nuna** — Suna, adireshin imel, bayani na gida
CGU.s6_s2_l2: **Bayani na aiki** — Sanarwar aiki, karangiyar zafi, menu, recipes, sinadari
CGU.s6_s2_l3: **Bayani na kuɗi** — Farashin sinadari, rashin, jajiya, yau kuɗi, invoices na dijital
CGU.s6_s2_l4: **Bayani na bugi** — Jajiyoyin rufi, lokaci, rasuwar bugi (daidaitawa daga dandali na ɗan gida)
CGU.s6_s2_l5: **Bayani na ciniki** — Samarwa ta abun, hanyoyin biya (daidaitawa daga tsarin POS)
CGU.s6_s2_l6: **Bayani na amfani** — Karantawa na wutar lantarki da ruwa
CGU.s6_s2_l7: **Bayani na asara** — Yanaye-yanaye, kumaye, da sabon bayani na sinadari
CGU.s6_s2_l8: **Abubuwan da aka saba saba** — Hotuna na abinci, alkalami da hotuna na invoice
CGU.s6_s2_l9: **Bayani na amfani** — Hulɗe na aiki, zaɓen harsuna, sadarwar mahada
CGU.s6_s3_p1: Bayani na User ana ajiye ne a cikin Supabase cloud infrastructure (Amazon Web Services). Bayani yana ware ne a waje da a tafiya. Tsarin mai yawan jama'a ya tabbatar da rabuwar bayani tsakanin gida.
CGU.s6_s4_title: 6.4. Watsi ga masu samarwa na AI
CGU.s6_s4_p1: Wasu bayani ana watsa zuwa ayyukan AI na ɗan gida (Anthropic) don sarrafa (binciken sanarwa, OCR, samarwa). RiveHub ta kulaɗa da sakewa bayani na mutum da amfani da bayani ne kawai da ake bukata don sarrafa da aka buƙatu. Wadannan watsi suna ƙarƙashin sirrin masu samarwa.
CGU.s6_s5_p1: Bayani da aka daidaita daga tsarin POS, dandali na bugi, da sadarwacewa yana wuce hanyar APIs na waɗannan ayyuka. RiveHub kawai ta shiga bayani da ke bukata don aiki na bukatun da aka kunna kuma ba ta ajiye bayani na biya na baƙin gida ba.
CGU.s6_s6_p1: Daidai da ka'idoji da suka danganta, User na wadannan haƙƙi:
CGU.s6_s6_l1: **Haƙƙin shiga** — Samu kwafi na bayani na mutum
CGU.s6_s6_l2: **Haƙƙin gyara** — Sabunta bayani mara daidai ko marasa cikakke
CGU.s6_s6_l3: **Haƙƙin gida** — Buƙata gogewa bayani na mutum
CGU.s6_s6_l4: **Haƙƙin katagogewa** — Samu bayani a tsari mai takaita, jinin na mosin
CGU.s6_s6_l5: **Hakkin Kunna Karni** — Kunna amfani da bayanka don niyoyi na musamman
CGU.s6_s6_l6: **Hakkin Janye Izini** — Cire izini na karni duk lokaci
CGU.s6_s6_p2: Don aiwatar da waɗannan haƙƙi, Mai Amfani zai iya tuntubo RiveHub a adreshi da aka nuna a sashe 13.
CGU.s6_s7_p1: Bayanan Mai Amfani yana jiyewa muddin ajiyar asusun ya kasance, har ma da bayan kashe jarida mai kuɗi. Mai Amfani zai iya kada waje a kowane lokaci buƙata jajjuyawar tsaye da batagaregara na duk bayanansu ta hanyar "Buga asusu na" aiki a cikin saitunan daftarsu, daidai da hakkin kashe (Art. 17 GDPR, Quebec Law 25). Wasu bayanan na iya jiyewa gaba da wannan lokaci idan ido ta shari'a.
CGU.s6_s7_p2: Bugu asusu yana haifar da cire duk bayanan gida, galibi jerinai, tirshi, jerin aiki, dokoki, da saita. Membobin ƙungiya suna riƙa nasu asusun kansu da tarihin nasarar su.
CGU.s6_s8_p1: Mai Amfani ya riƙe cikakken mallakin duk bayanan da aka saka, aka shigida, ko aka samarwa a cikin Aiki. RiveHub ba ya samu wani hakki na mallakin Bayanan Mai Amfani.
CGU.s7_s1_p1: Aiki RiveHub, wadanda suka haɗa da tushen tushe, tsarin gida, algorithms, littaftai, da alamar sunan, ana kare su da doka ta halittar ƙarni a Kanada da duniyar da ta dace. Babu wani abu a waɗannan juzuwan da ya ba Mai Amfani wani hakki game da waɗannan abubuwan, sai dai hakkin amfani a cikin kabi na jajjifar.
CGU.s7_s2_p1: Mai Amfani ya riƙe duk haƙƙi na abuwan da aka saka a Aiki (bayanai, menaje, recipes, hotuna, bayanan kuɗi). Mai Amfani ya ba RiveHub iyaka, ba na musamman, iyaka da za a iya buɗawa lokaci-lokaci na aiwatar da waɗannan abuwan kawai don niyar ba da Aiki.
CGU.s7_s3_p1: Abuwan da AI ta samarwa a bukatar Mai Amfani (jimooji na jama'a, ikoncewa, fassara, shawarwari) ana ba wa Mai Amfani don karbar amfani na kasuwanci ba tare da iyaka ba. RiveHub ba ta bu da hakki na halittar ƙarni akan waɗannan abubuwan.
CGU.s8_title: 8. Jajjifar, Cin Kudi, da Matakan Aiki
CGU.s8_s1_p1: Ana ba da Aiki a matakan masu zuwa:
CGU.s8_s1_l1: **Kyau** — Logbook, editon menaje, fassara ta harsuna da yawa, dandamali na jama'a
CGU.s8_s1_l2: **Mahimmanci** — Abuwan kyau + binciken kashin abinci, turu, yin menaje
CGU.s8_s1_l3: **Karfin Aiki** — Abuwan mahimmanci + jerin shirye-shirye, bukatar zaɓi, bin bambanci
CGU.s8_s1_l4: **Masaniya** — Abuwan karfin aiki + dashboard jishi, AI mafi yawa, kashin kuɗi
CGU.s8_s1_l5: **Jama'a** — Abuwan masaniya + gudanarwar wurare da yawa, goyon bayan da aka tsara, yin badi
CGU.s8_s1_p2: RiveHub ta ajiye hakki na canza abuwan matakan jajjifar. Duk wani canji da ke damawa da fasalai da aka jamawa a matakan jajjifar za a sanar da shi bayan 30 kwanaki.
CGU.s8_s2_p1: Ana jirar jajjifar watacciyyen jiya ko sanaye bisa zu'u na Mai Amfani, ta hanyar dandamaling samar da kuɗi Stripe. Fasi'u ana nunawa ta dala na Kanada (CAD) sai dai idan ba haka ba. Ana ƙara harajia masu dace da adadin da ake nuna.
CGU.s8_s3_p1: Ba za a maidowa kuɗi na jajjifar kowane wata ba don lokacin axonkar. Don jajjifar sanaye, ana iya nema maidowa bisa ƙimar ajiyar a cikin 14 kwanaki na maimaita. Waje da wannan lokaci, ba za a ba da maidowa kudi ba.
CGU.s8_s4_p1: Mai Amfani zai iya canja matakan jajjifar a duk lokaci daga saitunan asusun. Haɓakar aiki ne ke gida nan da nan. Raguwar aiki ne ke gida a farko na lokaci na cin kudi na gaba, amma an ci gaba da amfani da abuwan matakan samun mutane ba tare da lokaci ba.
CGU.s9_title: 9. Iyaka na Abubuwa da Suka Aiki
CGU.s9_s1_p1: Aiki yana ba da shi "kamar ya ke" da "kamar akwai." RiveHub ba ta ba da garantiya cewa Aiki zai kasance ba tare da kuskure ba, ba tare da tsaye ba, sabo, ko dace da wani niyya.
CGU.s9_s2_p1: Ba a buƙatar kowa ba RiveHub, officers, ma'aikatai, ko ma'adinan amfani ba za su kasancewa masu alaka da:
CGU.s9_s2_l1: Kashin kuɗi da suka fito daga bayanai marasa gaskiya da AI aka samarwa ko aka fitar ta OCR
CGU.s9_s2_l2: Hukumar jarrabawa daga haɓakawa gida bisa shawarwarin Aiki
CGU.s9_s2_l3: Kashin abinci ko kashin aiki da ke da alaƙa da shawarwarin AI
CGU.s9_s2_l4: Marasa gaskiya a bayanan da aka daidaita daga haɗin ƙarni na ƙarfi (POS, bukatar zaɓi)
CGU.s9_s2_l5: Abuwan da Mai Amfani ya buga a jama'a, ko da yake Aiki ya samarwa su
CGU.s9_s2_l6: Rashin aiki daga abin da ba sa iko a kai (host, mai ba da AI, dandamali da aka haɗa)
CGU.s9_s3_p1: Jimillar abubuwa da RiveHub ta karɓa wa Mai Amfani ana iyaka shi zuwa kuɗin jajjifar da Mai Amfani ya biya gaske a lokaci na **shida sha uku (12) buwan** kafin abin da ya haifar da karewa.
CGU.s9_s4_p1: Ba za RiveHub ta kasancewa masu karɓa abubuwa daga wani katsanar aiki ba, sai da yake haɗa da: bala'u na duniya, cututtuka na jama'a, gwagwarmaka, kasincewar gida na Internet, rashin aiki na mai ba da ƙarfi na ƙarfi, ko ayyukan gwamnati.
CGU.s10_s1_p1: Mai Amfani zai iya soke jajjifar su duk lokaci ta hanyar saitunan asusun ko jerin cin kudi na Stripe. Sokewa ne ke gida a ƙarshen lokacin cin kudi na axonkar.
CGU.s10_s2_p1: RiveHub ta ajiye hakki na dakatar ko tufa amfani da Mai Amfani a lokaci na keta da waɗannan juzuwan, amfani marasa kula da Aiki, rashin biyan kuɗi na ci gaba, ko duk ayyuka da ke yiwuwa lalata Aiki ko sauran mai amfani. Za a sanar da Mai Amfani ta imel kafin duk tufi, sai dai a lokacin gaggawa.
CGU.s10_s3_p1: Lokacin dakatar, Mai amfani yana da lokaci na **30-rana** don fitar da bayanansu ta amfani da kayan aikin fitar. Bayan wannan lokaci, bayanan za su kashe a bisa sashe 6.7. RiveHub ta yi alkaushi na samar da bayanan a tsarin da mai kyau, siffar da za a iya karantawa ta injina (CSV, JSON).
CGU.s10_s4_p1: Lokacin dakatar, duk haɗin gwiwar ɗan waje (POS systems, reservations, social media) ana kashe su ba tare da amfani ba. Alamar ƙarfafan OAuth ba a yi mu bugi. Mai amfani yana da alhakin tabbatar cewa ana cire haɗin jiya daidai tare da sabbin sabbin aiki.
CGU.s11_p1: RiveHub tana bugi damar canza waɗannan sharuddi a kowane lokaci. Za a gaya wa Masu amfani game da kowane canje-canjen mahimmanci ta imel da sanarwa a cikin app, tare da {ingatai na} **15-rana** jiya kafin sabbin sharuddin aiwata.
CGU.s11_p2: Acikin amfani da aikin bayan gida za a aiwata sabuwar sharuddin yana nufin karben sharuddin da aka canja.
CGU.s11_p3: Idan Mai amfani ba ya yarda da canje-canjen, za su iya soke azaman a biye da sashe 10 jiya kafin sabuwar sharuddin aiwata.
CGU.s12_p1: Waɗannan sharuddin ana bi da su ƙanunin Jihar Quebec da ƙanunin tarayya na Kanada da suka dace.
CGU.s12_p2: Duk wata rikici ta waɗannan sharuddin ko amfani da aikin za a gabatar da ita ga mahakama na musamman na Jihar Quebec, Deggen Montreal.
CGU.s12_p3: Idan aka kashe, aljihun sun yarda da yunƙurin warware jiya gida ta kyakkyawa kafin zuwa gida.
CGU.s13_p1: Ga kowane tambaya game da waɗannan sharuddin, kariyar bayananku, ko aiki na Service, tun da mu ne: **support@rivehub.com**

AIPage.meta_description: Gano yadda AI don sarrafa gida ta yi aiki da kudin abinci, HACCP kwanci, injiniyar menu, da aiki na yau-yau. Filin AI kyauta - babu katuwa lamiri.
AIPage.hero_title: Filin AI wanda aka gina don gidaje
AIPage.hero_description: RiveHub tana amfani da niyyar jiya don yi aiki da gida kudin abinci gida, HACCP kwanci, injiniyar menu, da yanke shawara na aiki — saboda kuka na iya mayawa ne ga kasua, ba na jigon lissafi ba.
AIPage.what_title: Me za AI iya yi don gidanku?
AIPage.what_description: AI don sarrafa gida ta maye gurbin aiki na hannu tare da niyyar jiya. Daga sannin fakitocin zuwa hasashen bukatun shirye-shirye, ga yadda AI ta canja aiki na yau-yau.
AIPage.f1_desc: AI ta bincika alamu na aiki, gida na zafi, da sanarwar ma'aikaci don bayar da shawarewa mai amfani — maye gurbin karatun takarda tare da sanarwar da maye karanta.
AIPage.f2_desc: AI ta kula da yamun kwanci, tumbude bakin ciki marasa, da haifar ripoti a karatu na bincike — ajiye gidanku da kumintawa da shirya ne.
AIPage.f3_desc: Kula da kudin saka, gano gida ba daidai ba, da lissafi na hakika dufa gida - da kuma aiki. AI ta gaya ne muku kafin kudin ya lalace.
AIPage.f4_desc: Harbi hoton ko fakitar PDF. AI ta fitar da kowane jere, kayan aiki, jiya, da farashin — juya sa'o'in bayanan shigar zuwa dakika.
AIPage.f5_desc: Gano abincin da ya fi ba tare da bincike matrix BCG. AI ta ba da shawarewa don canja menu dangane da kudin abinci, sanyayyar jama'a, da bayanan dufa.
AIPage.f6_desc: AI ta fassara umarnin aiki, bakin jeri, da menu na aji da yawa — tabbatar cewa kowane memba na aji ya fahimci aiki su daidai.
AIPage.why_title: Me gidaje ke canza zuwa AI
AIPage.why_description: Gidaje masu amfani da AI don sarrafa suna bayar da saurin yanke shawara, rage sharar abinci, da ƙarfi kwanci. Ga abin da za ta canja lokacin za ka dakatar da gisa ki sani.
AIPage.b1_desc: AI ta yi aiki da sannin fakitocin, gida da kwanci, da lissafin kudin da mahimman shifta. Jama'a ka kashe karfi kaɗan a takarda da kuma kara a aiki na sabuki.
AIPage.b2_desc: Gida na kudin abinci gida na lokaci da gane watsi taimaka gidaje gano da bugi asirin watsi — galibi biya na filin a cikin jiya na farko.
AIPage.b3_desc: Ci gaba da sa ido kan HACCP na nufin ba za ka taɓa rude tuni kafin bincike. AI yana kiyaye bayanan halin yau da kullun gida, daidai, da za'a iya gano shi nan-nan.
AIPage.how_title: Yadda RiveHub ke amfani da AI a cikin gidanka
AIPage.how_description: RiveHub ba gajiya mai AI kawai ba ne. Kowane sifa an tsara shi kakaɓon yadda gidai suke aiki - daga kicin zuwa gida.
AIPage.step1_desc: Haɗa POS (Toast, Square, Lightspeed, SumUp, Zettle), majora fakurin, kuma karya jama'a. Shirye-shirye yana ɗan mintuna 15.
AIPage.step2_desc: A cikin sa'o'i 48, AI na RiveHub ya fahimta tsarin kudin ki, juyaye aiki, da ayyukan tabbatar - kuma ya fara ba da bayani.
AIPage.step3_desc: Gargajiya ta yau da kullun game da cutun abinci, rahotannin tabbataccen aiki ta atomatik, simintin gida da aka rangwama, da jiyar shirye-shirye - duk ba tare da aiki na hannu ba.
AIPage.step4_desc: Yayin da gidaka ke girma, AI ta girma tare ki - yana tunani da gidai masu yawa, sabuwar jama'a, da girman matsala ba tare da ƙari ba.
AIPage.cta_title: Kuma nisha aur AI a cikin gidanka?
AIPage.cta_description: Shiga gidai jiya da jiya da ke amfani da RiveHub don atomatik aiki, rage kudin, kuma kiyaye daidai - ja da AI.
AIPage.cta_subtext: Babu kaadun babbar. Balewa kyauta, har abada.

FAQ.title: Tambayoyi da aka tattara
FAQ.subtitle: Komai da kake buƙata kafin ka fara
FAQ.q1_q: Yaya RiveHub ke haɗa da POS system na?
FAQ.q1_a: RiveHub yana haɗa gida tare da manyan POS systems kamar Toast, Square, SumUp, Lightspeed, da Zettle. Saitarwa ɗaɗa kasa da mintuna 5 — kawai ba da izini ga haɗi da bayananka zaɓi mamaye na atomatik.
FAQ.q2_q: Shin bayanan gidajen jiya na a karfe?
FAQ.q2_a: Tabbas. Duk bayanan an shiryar su a aiki da a hutu. Muna amfani da Supabase gida tare da karfi a jere-jere, ma'ana bayananka an keɓe kuma kawai ƙungiyarka za ta iya abubuwa. Ba mu gaji ko sayar da bayananku ba.
FAQ.q3_a: Yawancin gidajen jiya suna aiki gaba daya a cikin mintuna 15. Haɗa POS, gaida ƙungiyarka, da RiveHub ta fara koyo alamarka da jiya. Za ka karbi shawarwari na karko a cikin awanni 48.
FAQ.q4_q: Me ya faru bayan shirin kyauta?
FAQ.q4_a: Shirin Essence kyauta babu lokaci — yi amfani kamar yadda kake son. Lokacin da kake shirye don hasumawa na AI kamar tsarin oda da hadaka hadaka na aljihun, sabunta zuwa Horizon ko Matsin-lamba a kowane lokaci.
FAQ.q5_q: Shin ƙungiyar na zata iya amfani da RiveHub a harshenta?
FAQ.q5_a: Eh. RiveHub yana tallafawa {count} harsuna da laburan — daga Turanci da Faransanci zuwa Bengali, Kabyle da Cantonese. Kowane aiki, kartin resipji da sura ta nagari ta jiya ana fassara da jiya ga kowane memba na ƙungiya. Babu hadaka harsuna.
FAQ.q6_a: RiveHub an yi ta ƙa-ƙa. Interface ɗin rarrafo ne da hira-da-gani — ƙungiyar za ta iya amfani da shi nan da nan. Muna ba da jagirori na samarda da ƙwaƙwalwar goyan baya sai chat don kowane tambaya.
FAQ.q7_q: Yaya RiveHub ke jiyar HACCP ka rabani?
FAQ.q7_a: RiveHub tana aiki azaman jiyarwaldu ta atomatik. Gwajin zafi na jiya, canja mai da canja, da umarnin ma'aikata suna riba da kyau a cikin jadwalen rabani masu shirye ba tare da wata takarada ba.

ComplianceSection.title: Jajjuyar Bugun Duka
ComplianceSection.subtitle: Jerin shawo HACCP, jerin zafi, da jerin shawo tsarin mulki — dijitalai, daidai da ƙasar, da koyaushe shirdi ga bincike. Babu ƙarin takoba takarda.
ComplianceSection.geo_adaptive_desc: Saita ta atomatik dangane da ƙasarki — MAPAQ, FDA, DDPP, da ɗari. Iyakokin zafi, jerin abubuwan haɗa, da bukatuwan horon suna daidaita nan da nan.
ComplianceSection.checklists_desc: Bubuwan buɗe, rufe, jerin aiki, da jerin karɓa da aka gina daga tsarin tsarin mulki. Kammala akan kowane na'ura tare da bugun guda.
ComplianceSection.temperature_desc: Rubuce kayyayya tare da tabbatacciyar iyaka. Kayyayya masu zafi waje suna haifar da sauri gajere tare da gajeren aiki.
ComplianceSection.alerts_desc: Canjin maƙa suna haiki ta atomatik. Gane, warware, da rubuce abubuwan maimaita — duka a taban bincike.
ComplianceSection.audit_trail_desc: Kowane shigarwa yana da lissafi na lokaci, hannu, da tsare. Masu bincike suna ga jerin dijitalai mai tsabta, tabbatacce.
ComplianceSection.digital_records_desc: Daidai da MAPAQ, FDA, da EU ƙa'ide na ɓugyewa bayanan dijitalai. Kawo rahotin bincike a bugun guda.
ComplianceSection.cta_desc: Canza takoba takarda tare da injin jajjuyar mai raɓe a kasar.
